name: Sandbox Bakery Flow (orchestration dry-run)
description: Sandbox-only orchestration dry-run: Developer → UI Lead → Code Reviewer with verdict-driven back-routing. Scenario: Bakery POS checkout modal UX improvement. No production repo mutation.

phases.name: Developer Implementation
phases.prompt: Implement the Bakery POS checkout modal UX improvement. Write a mock report. Return your status on the first line: READY_FOR_AGY_REVIEW, READY_FOR_CODEX_REVIEW, READY_FOR_REVIEW_PACKAGE, or BLOCKED. Text only; do not edit real files.

phases.name: UI/UX Review
phases.prompt: Review the Developer's mock report for UI/UX quality: visual, responsive, accessibility, interaction. Return your verdict on the first line: PASS, PASS WITH NOTES, REQUEST UX CHANGES, or BLOCKED. Do not edit files or run shell commands.

phases.name: Codex Code Review
phases.prompt: Review the Developer's implementation for correctness, safety, boundary handling, and test coverage. Return your verdict on the first line: PASS, PASS WITH NOTES, REQUEST CHANGES, or BLOCKED. Do not edit files.
